query: SELECT result, COUNT(*) as count FROM call_queue WHERE DATE(createdAt) = CURDATE() AND result IS NOT NULL GROUP BY result ORDER BY count DESC
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3tmNk4KiQphQsi9.6a10ffd04b61 --database QaP68Z2AATogwpccsoDAFH --execute SELECT result, COUNT(*) as count FROM call_queue WHERE DATE(createdAt) = CURDATE() AND result IS NOT NULL GROUP BY result ORDER BY count DESC
